items.raw_desc: Szempilla göndörítő Beautifly Lashes Up:The Beautifly Lashes Up is a heated electric curler that allows you to curl your lashes quickly and safely with a long-lasting effect for up to 24 hours. Thanks to thermal styling, it creates a natural lift and visually enhances the length and volume of the eyelashes without the need to visit the salon. The device is suitable for everyday make-up as well as for a more expressive evening look, when you want to achieve a groomed and open look in a few minutes. The Beautifly Lashes Up curler heats up in 30 seconds and offers three temperature levels (60, 80 and 100°C) to adapt to fine, short and thick lashes. The safe silicone attachment conducts heat evenly and protects eyelashes from damage. Charging is via the USB port (USB-C), a full charge takes approximately 40 minutes and then allows up to 90 minutes of use, with the device having an automatic shutdown after 5 minutes of inactivity.
